title: Geometrical IP Lock (GIL) Invariants Schema
description: Deterministic tolerances for pixel-perfect identity preservation in generated variations.

gil_id.description: Unique cryptographic hash of the source 3D asset (mold).

max_drift_px.description: Maximum allowed pixel drift outside the canonical SAM2 mask boundaries.

min_iou.description: Minimum Intersection over Union (IoU) required between the source depth map and the generated depth map.
